title: Broglis Plants
description: Adds more weird and wonderful plants to Minecraft!
body:
Adds 7 new unique and interesting plants:

- Flytraps, Sundews and Pitfall Plants can all be found in normal and mangrove swamps, the flytraps will snap and hurt players and monsters, Sundews will slow entities down slightly with their stickiness and pitfall plants can be fed by throwing any vanilla meat item at it when its hungry and it will then spit out a bone.

 - Mandrake root can be found in the dark oak forest, purely decorative when planted but if you uproot it it will let out a piercing cry when players or monsters are nearby!

 - Stinky Flowers can be found in jungles and will puff nauseating spores into the air should you walk too close to them.

 - Sandbox Trees, spawn in jungles, their trunks are covered in poisonous thorns and explosive seed pods hang in their branches waiting to drop on any unsuspecting player or monster that walks under them!

 -  Totem Poles, spawn in jungles and feature a column of sandbox tree logs along with their deadly thorns adorned with a menacing totem face! Totem blocks can be made by stripping sandbox logs with an axe and can be repeatedly stripped to carve different designs.

 - Giant Lily Pads spawn on the banks and shores of the swamp and jungle biomes, when they reach the surface theyll grow to full size when they have space to do so.

Requires GeckoLib.

Please provide credit it you intend to make videos using the mod or add it to modpacks.
